title: Manage the preparation of motor sport competition vehicles
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage the preparation of motor sport competition vehicles demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop preparation specifications and checklists

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from competition information1.2 Analyse rules, regulations, and vehicle specifications and tolerances for competitive advantage1.3 Document and communicate work specifications to required personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from competition information1.2 Analyse rules, regulations, and vehicle specifications and tolerances for competitive advantage1.3 Document and communicate work specifications to required personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from competition information1.2 Analyse rules, regulations, and vehicle specifications and tolerances for competitive advantage1.3 Document and communicate work specifications to required personnel.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop preparation specifications and checklists

elements.title: Develop preparation schedule

pcs.text: Identify and source equipment and capabilities of required personnel to meet job specifications 2.2 Analyse constraints to schedule and document optimum sequence for vehicle preparation 2.3 Analyse critical path and document factors affecting that path2.4 Finalise preparation schedule and distribute to required personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and source equipment and capabilities of required personnel to meet job specifications 2.2 Analyse constraints to schedule and document optimum sequence for vehicle preparation 2.3 Analyse critical path and document factors affecting that path2.4 Finalise preparation schedule and distribute to required personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and source equipment and capabilities of required personnel to meet job specifications 2.2 Analyse constraints to schedule and document optimum sequence for vehicle preparation 2.3 Analyse critical path and document factors affecting that path2.4 Finalise preparation schedule and distribute to required personnel.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop preparation schedule

elements.title: Supervise preparation

pcs.text: Monitor team adherence to preparation schedule according to team requirements3.2 Monitor work area for layout according to job requirements and for cleanliness3.3 Carry out checks of vehicle during and after installation of components to ensure complete fitting3.4 Evaluate and resolve problems with work area or operation of equipment according to safety and environmental requirements3.5 Evaluate proposals for modifications or adaptation of equipment and components and adapt or adopt changes as required according to team requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor team adherence to preparation schedule according to team requirements3.2 Monitor work area for layout according to job requirements and for cleanliness3.3 Carry out checks of vehicle during and after installation of components to ensure complete fitting3.4 Evaluate and resolve problems with work area or operation of equipment according to safety and environmental requirements3.5 Evaluate proposals for modifications or adaptation of equipment and components and adapt or adopt changes as required according to team requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor team adherence to preparation schedule according to team requirements3.2 Monitor work area for layout according to job requirements and for cleanliness3.3 Carry out checks of vehicle during and after installation of components to ensure complete fitting3.4 Evaluate and resolve problems with work area or operation of equipment according to safety and environmental requirements3.5 Evaluate proposals for modifications or adaptation of equipment and components and adapt or adopt changes as required according to team requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Supervise preparation

elements.title: Supervise post-assembly checks

pcs.text: Inspect vehicle, and identify and address problems according to team requirements4.2 Supervise post-preparation checks and vehicle start-up by team 4.3 Supervise vehicle baseline set-up by team 4.4 Supervise clean-up of work area by team 4.5 Carry out final inspection of work area and vehicle and complete documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect vehicle, and identify and address problems according to team requirements4.2 Supervise post-preparation checks and vehicle start-up by team 4.3 Supervise vehicle baseline set-up by team 4.4 Supervise clean-up of work area by team 4.5 Carry out final inspection of work area and vehicle and complete documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect vehicle, and identify and address problems according to team requirements4.2 Supervise post-preparation checks and vehicle start-up by team 4.3 Supervise vehicle baseline set-up by team 4.4 Supervise clean-up of work area by team 4.5 Carry out final inspection of work area and vehicle and complete documentation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Supervise post-assembly checks

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
